demographics.living_situation: lives largely housebound at home; adult child helps and is present today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole body aches deep in the bones, my legs gave out on me today, and it hurts just to have my chest touched.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She had a fall today when her legs buckled and now she can't stand or walk, and the deep bone pain is unbearable.

symptom_narrative.onset: the deep bone aches have crept up over about six months; the legs giving way and the fall happened today
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly six months, much worse today
symptom_narrative.character: deep, aching, poorly localised bone pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe and the weakness came on until her thighs just stopped working
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lower back, hips, both legs, and it hurts to press on her breastbone and shins
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, steadily worse over months, then a sudden collapse today
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; ordinary paracetamol barely touches it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement or being helped to reposition, and putting weight on her legs
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very tired and washed out, has been walking with a waddle, and gets cramping spasms in her calves
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no single injury before today; the weakness and aching have been slowly building
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can no longer rise from a chair without being lifted; bedbound since the fall today; largely housebound for weeks

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no bone or joint conditions she knows of; generally frail and slowing down

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: eats very little, hardly any dairy or fortified foods; barely leaves the house and rarely gets outside
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the house is kept dark with the curtains drawn; her adult child does the shopping and checks on her

objective_data_offered.value: adult child says she cannot get up from a chair or bed without being physically lifted, and her thighs seem to have given out
she had a low-impact fall today when her legs buckled and has not been able to stand or walk since
frail, thin, chronically unwell-looking; winces and grimaces whenever she is repositioned in bed
home is dimly lit with heavy curtains drawn; she is described as rarely going outdoors
she thinks she weighs around 58 kg
